title: Alacrity | Xaero's World Map Support
description: Retexture of Xaero's World Map in Alacrity style
body:
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53bd9ada751157c5b2f5d749e2caa1176956530f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity-xaeros-world-map-support) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71bb7f4433bdaf0acd433da49e7610cc9b8c59d.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/alacrity-xaeros-world-map-support) ---
An **unofficial compatibility pack** designed to align the textures of [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) mod with the phenomenal [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity) resource pack. This pack is **100% completed**, including: - Redesign of all GUI buttons. - Removal of top-right-corner NESW. - Support for [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims). **Note:** - Require [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) to function. - For the best experience, use this pack alongside [Alacrity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity). - For Feedback / Bug Report / Suggestion, please DM me on my **Discord (@thedatthai)**. **Credits:** - [Satellence](https://modrinth.com/user/Satellence) - Creator of Alacrity - [thexaero](https://modrinth.com/user/ANNqL3WC) - Creator of Xaero's World Map - Special thanks to "deleted user" from the [supporter group](https://discord.gg/ZAV7uWnt5k) for coming up with the original idea. ## Showcase: ![Showcase (Textures)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1392c0c9f1733a53dfc86884802eebb3379c1866.png) ![Showcase (In-Game)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af00ff9abef1e57f1c19434a13f83b29bf8a3128.jpeg)
